CIPHER.1324.cipherString: The life where nothing was ever unexpected. Or inconvenient. Or unusual. The life without color, pain or past.
CIPHER.1324.question: A quote by Lois Lowry has been encoded using the Aristocrat Cipher for you to decode. What does it say?
CIPHER.1324.author: Lois Lowry

CIPHER.1325.cipherString: The genius, wit, and spirit of a nation are discovered in its proverbs.
CIPHER.1325.question: During a field trip, you notice these strange markings on a metal plaque. They represent a quote, encoded using an Atbash Cipher. What does it say?

CIPHER.1326.cipherString: Nature has created us solely to be happy--yes, all of us from the crawling worm to the eagle lost in the clouds.
CIPHER.1326.question: You receive this puzzling text during a live science broadcast. It contains a quote, encrypted as an Aristocrat. What does it say?

CIPHER.1327.cipherString: In a healthy state of the organism all wounds have a tendency to heal.
CIPHER.1327.question: Found inside a plastic frog's stomach: this Porta note by Mme. Swetchine using a keyword of BODIES. What does it say?
CIPHER.1327.author: Mme. Swetchine

CIPHER.1328.cipherString: Star Wars is more fairy tale than true science fiction.
CIPHER.1328.question: Hidden in the source code of a retro video game, this Nihilist Substitution puzzle reveals a quote by Mark Hamill with a keyword of GALAXY and polybius key of NONINTUITIVE. What does it say?
CIPHER.1328.author: Mark Hamill

CIPHER.1329.cipherString: I would make my mom buy me the toy doctor kit.
CIPHER.1329.question: A message was left on the whiteboard after science club. It's a quote by figure skater and physician Debi Thomas encoded using a Baconian cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1329.author: figure skater and physician Debi Thomas

CIPHER.1330.cipherString: If you hear a voice within you say 'you cannot paint,' then by all means paint, and that voice will be silenced.
CIPHER.1330.question: On the back of a piece of artwork on display at your local museum, you notice this quote by Vincent Van Gogh, encrypted as a Caesar cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1330.author: Vincent Van Gogh

CIPHER.1331.cipherString: don't allow your life to disappear into an abstract mirage
CIPHER.1331.question: The school's ancient overhead projector flickered and burned this Nihilist Substitution message onto the screen—decode this Sunday Adelaja quote that has been encoded with a keyword length of 5.  The 18th through 28th cipher units (46 49 86 34 80 39 36 65 24 50 36) decode to be TODISAPPEAR. What does it say?
CIPHER.1331.author: Sunday Adelaja

CIPHER.1352.cipherString: Do not let the grass grow on the path of friendship.
CIPHER.1352.question: An old proverb attributed to various sources has been encrypted as a Fractionated Morse cipher.  You are told that the quote has ENDS in it corresponding to the encoded text B B R G Q, meaning B = ●×–; G = ●●●; Q = ×●●; R = ●●×. What does it say?
CIPHER.1352.author: old proverb

CIPHER.1333.cipherString: A man's dreams are a maze even he cannot know.
CIPHER.1333.question: Someone passed you a piece of paper with this Baconian encoded quote by Robert Jordan. You are told that the deciphered text ends with KNOW. What does it say?
CIPHER.1333.author: Robert Jordan

CIPHER.1334.cipherString: En casa, me encanta sentarme con él en el suelo y jugar a sus juegos preferidos. Mi nieto y yo tenemos una relación muy cercana.
CIPHER.1334.question: This Spanish-language text is from a passage where a grandmother talks about her grandchild. It has been encoded as a K1 Xenocrypt for you to decrypt.

CIPHER.1335.cipherString: I design some of my own clothes now.
CIPHER.1335.question: A time-capsule USB drive from 1983 just auto-opened with this Affine-encrypted message by Kiernan Shipka with a=15 and b=2. What does it say?
CIPHER.1335.author: Kiernan Shipka

CIPHER.1336.cipherString: If you come here, you will find a hidden treasure.
CIPHER.1336.question: The following odd symbols were found when a tomb was opened, but you recognized it as the handiwork of a prankster who scratched a quote by Paulo Coelho on the wall using a Baconian alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.1336.author: Paulo Coelho

CIPHER.1337.cipherString: Work for a cause, not for applause. Live your life to express yourself, not to impress others.
CIPHER.1337.question: Shree Shambav was often heard to say the following phrase which has been encoded as a Checkerboard with a polybius key of HUMBLEHEARTED. What does it say?
CIPHER.1337.author: Shree Shambav

CIPHER.1351.cipherString: Maybe true travel is not the transportation of the body, but a change of perception, renewing the mind.
CIPHER.1351.question: You stumble across this encoded text on an old floppy disk labeled “Project Discovery.” It's a quote by Ben Okri encoded as an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.1351.author: Ben Okri

CIPHER.1339.question: A mysterious postcard arrives from an unknown sender. It contains a coded quote, written in a Cryptarithm. What do the values 416534 37411074 decode to?

CIPHER.1340.cipherString: To awaken quite alone in a strange town, is one of the pleasantest sensations in the world.
CIPHER.1340.question: Freya Stark has been heard to say the following phrase that has been encoded using the Atbash Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1340.author: Freya Stark

CIPHER.1341.cipherString: A fog cannot be dispelled with a fan.
CIPHER.1341.question: The vending machine gave you a slip with a Japanese proverb hidden in an Affine cipher. You are told that the cipher text LG decodes to be BE. What does it say?
CIPHER.1341.author: Japanese proverb

CIPHER.1342.cipherString: Always watch where you are going. Otherwise, you may step on a piece of the Forest that was left out by mistake.
CIPHER.1342.question: A note falls out of a borrowed library book. The message is a quote by A.A. Milne, written as a Caesar Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.1342.author: A.A. Milne

CIPHER.1343.cipherString: Vamos a ver el atardecer con un cielo de tonos anaranjados. Luego, bajo el cielo estrellado, vamos a compartir nuestras impresiones del día.
CIPHER.1343.question: This Spanish-language text describes what a girl and her friends are going to do on the first evening of their vacation. It has been encoded as a K1 Xenocrypt for you to decrypt.

CIPHER.1344.question: Decrypt the following cipher text that has been encoded using the Cryptarithm Cipher. What do the values 0126978 3714 decode to?

CIPHER.1349.cipherString: Have you noticed in your past experience that your kind interpretations were almost always truer than your harsh ones?
CIPHER.1349.question: You discover a scrap of paper tucked inside an old lab notebook. It contains a question by Lawrence G. Lovasik encoded as a Patristocrat using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains R KIND corresponding to the ciphertext N EQGZ on the second line. What does it say?
CIPHER.1349.author: Lawrence G. Lovasik

CIPHER.1346.cipherString: One does not attain everything he wishes for. Winds blow counter to what the ships desire.
CIPHER.1346.question: You open a forgotten email draft saved in the school's computer system. It holds a quote by Al-Mutanabbi encoded in a Complete Columnar. The quote has COUNTER somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.1346.author: Al-Mutanabbi

CIPHER.1347.cipherString: Autumn trees shed leaves; skinning the tree one by one; until it is bare.
CIPHER.1347.question: The following haiku from a movie has been encoded as a Porta. The 45th through 49th cipher characters (LHCYO) decode to be UNTIL. What does it say?
CIPHER.1347.author: a movie

CIPHER.1338.cipherString: There is more in a common bubble than those who have only played with them generally imagine.
CIPHER.1338.question: You find an encoded message in the test tube rack, written on masking tape. It's a quote by C. V. Boys, written in an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.1338.author: C. V. Boys

CIPHER.1345.cipherString: Each precious here and now moment is your life. What you do every day, in the present, that is the story and substance of your life.
CIPHER.1345.question: You receive this cryptic message from the future through an online time capsule. It's a quote about keeping perspective, written in a Patristocrat using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains WHAT Y at the end of the first line corresponding with the ciphertext QJVD S. What does it say?

CIPHER.1350.cipherString: Statistics is a body of methods for making wise decisions in the face of uncertainty
CIPHER.1350.question: Your graphing calculator won’t stop displaying this Checkerboard puzzle. The 27th through 35th cipher units (VB EB IH EA IB EH GB GA VI) decode to be FOR MAKING. What does it say?

CIPHER.1348.cipherString: Even rulers, notoriously the slowest of men to change, realized that something had to be done.
CIPHER.1348.question: An old robot prototype suddenly prints this encoded text. It's a quote by Robert Sheckley, encrypted using an Aristocrat. What does it say?
CIPHER.1348.author: Robert Sheckley

CIPHER.1332.cipherString: He who would gather honey must brave the sting of the bees.
CIPHER.1332.question: The bus route sign briefly displayed a Dutch Proverb in a Fractionated Morse cipher. You are told that the quote has WHO WO in it corresponding to the encoded text Y L D B L T O L A, meaning A = ●●–; B = ●×–; D = ●●●; L = ––×; O = –×–; T = ×●–; Y = ××●. What does it say?
CIPHER.1332.author: Dutch Proverb

CIPHER.1353.cipherString: Health and good humor are to the human body like sunshine to vegetation.
CIPHER.1353.question: While debugging a program, you find this hidden in the comments. It's a quote by Massillon, encrypted as a Complete Columnar. The quote has AND GOOD somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.1353.author: Massillon
